ref_text_raw: With Kundalini Yoga the Kundalini energy (enlightenment energy) is awakened through yoga postures, breathing exercises, mantras and visualizations.

text: With Kadali Yoga, the Kadali energy, enlightenment energy, is awakened through yoga postures, breathing exercises, mantras, and visualizations.
